Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Ibis Electronic Equipment Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Ibis Electronic Equipment Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical specimen of a 'single-person shell company primarily engaged in university/laboratory procurement proxy trading,' dogmatically mislabeled as an electronic manufacturing plant by the official system. The official commercial system, merely because its name contains 'Electronic Equipment,' mechanically assigned it to the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, physical probes and historical snapshots directly exposed this industrial disguise: this is a super-old shell established in 2009, and its former name thoroughly reveals its true colors—'Nanjing Ibis Teaching Equipment Co., Ltd.' It was never involved in electronic manufacturing; it deals in 'teaching equipment'! Examining its baseline parameters: the 2024 insured headcount is only '1 person,' with a paid-in capital of 1 million RMB. Its registered address at 'Room 506, Youyi Business Building, No. 21 Ruijin Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City' is an extremely ordinary single room in a downtown commercial office building. Establishing an assembly line to manufacture electronic and electromechanical equipment on the 5th floor of a downtown business building with 1 employee? This is completely absurd. Reviewing its hodgepodge business license: 'sales of electromechanical equipment, communication equipment, teaching equipment, laboratory equipment, sporting goods, Class I medical devices, daily necessities... and business information consulting.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a B2B/B2G Procurement Proxy & Trading Shell that specifically orbits around universities, research institutes, or corporate institutions for 'universal procurement proxy trading and bidding.' The owner (Xu Zhenyu) utilizes this shell: whatever experimental instruments, teaching computers, or even sporting goods and office consumables the clients need, he procures from external sources, acts as a proxy seller, and issues invoices.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 74)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ONE-PERSON UNIVERSAL TRADING SHELL
